articles.author: Malcolm Brabant, Trine Villemann
articles.title: A decade after Brexit, UK voters reflect on decision to break from European Union - PBS
articles.description: Tuesday marks the 10th anniversary of the most divisive day in Britain’s recent history: Brexit, the vote to leave the European Union. Voters were promised a Britain free of European laws, decreased immigration, and a major boost to business, without the EU’s…
